arts.ttl: Man United enquire over shock loan move for Chelsea star Christopher Nkunku - as Blues prepare bid for Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Nkunku, who has scored 13 goals, has struggled to dislodge Nicolas Jackson in attack, while Cole Palmer's form has prevented the 27-year-old from playing in attacking midfield.

arts.ttl: Man Utd injuries: Every player out of Fulham clash
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United injury news ahead of their trip to Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Ruben Amorim could have transfer opportunity for Viktor Gyokeres alternative
arts.sum: Manchester United could have the chance to sign an alternative to striker Viktor Gyokeres if they choose to replace their outgoing forwards.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes tells team-mates they must show they 'have the BALLS' to play for Man United, as captain breaks silence on Ruben Amorim's 'worst team in club history' claim
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has warned team-mates that the onus is on them to show they 'have the balls to play for this club' as they look to turn their miserable season around.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville responds to Match of the Day legend's sensational claim that he should replace Ruben Amorim as Man United MANAGER - giving two reasons why he's 'wrong'
arts.sum: Former Match of the Day presenter Lynam suggested that Neville is the ideal candidate for the job given his passion for United, his personality and his business sense.

arts.ttl: Owen Hargreaves claims Man Utd duo 'would be fourth or fifth choice' under Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: TNT Sport pundit Owen Hargreaves played under Sir Alex Ferguson at Manchester United and has pinpointed the stark difference between their current strikers and the greats of the past

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes compares Ruben Amorim to his former Man Utd boss Ole Gunnar Solskjaer
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has likened Ruben Amorim's comments slamming the team to ones previously made by the club's old boss, Ole Gunnar Solskjaer

arts.ttl: Man United handed major boost as Government announces backing for Old Trafford regeneration project - as Red Devils aim for 100,000 super-stadium
arts.sum: The Government said the regeneration project would be a 'shining example of the bold pro-development model that will drive growth across the region'.

arts.ttl: 'Need balls to play for this club' - Bruno Fernandes delivers passionate response to Manchester United problems
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has opened up on the pressure of playing for Man Utd and urged his teammates to start throwing a few punches back after a series of tough results.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes urges Ruben Amorim to follow Alex Ferguson example after late Man Utd heroics
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes scored Manchester Unitd's late winner in their 2-1 victory over Rangers in the Europa League on Thursday evening, with the strike the latest in a long line of late winners
